fortinet.fortimanager.fmgr_generic.short_description: Build and send generic FortiManager API request.
fortinet.fortimanager.fmgr_generic.description: This module is for generic fortimanager requests. it receives raw json-rpc data, and sends it to fortimanager, finally returns the response to users. This module also rely on fortimanager httpapi plugin as the transport. the payload doesn't include session, the httpapi plugin will automatically fill the session later. the username and password is not managed by the module, but by the plugin.

access_token.description: The token to access FortiManager without using username and password.

forticloud_access_token.description: authenticate Ansible client with forticloud API access token

rc_succeeded.description: the rc codes list with which the conditions to succeed will be overriden

rc_failed.description: the rc codes list with which the conditions to fail will be overriden

workspace_locking_adom.description: no description

workspace_locking_timeout.description: no description

method.description: the method of the json-rpc it must be in [get, add, set, update, delete, move, clone, exec]

json.description: the raw json-formatted payload to send to fortimanager
